prompt: A female knight on a black steed in an autumn forest, she has a slim, athletic feminine build, narrow waist, straight posture, and composed bearing and sits upright in a dark leather saddle, one leg visible along the horse’s side. Her right hand holds the brown leather reins loosely. Her left hand is gripping the hilt of a long, unsheathed elegant sword pointed diagonally downward, the blade is adorned with mystical runes. Her expression is serious, watchful, and calm, with direct eye contact toward the viewer. The knight has a western-european, french phenotype: Fair, lightly warm skin; oval face; soft high cheekbones; refined straight nose; gently shaped lips; large light auburn eyes; natural brows. She has long, wavy auburn-red hair falling over her shoulders and down her back. A fitted full-white metallic headpiece with blue ornamental painting covers the crown of her head and frames her face, leaving the front of her hair visible. Elegant full white plate armor that is painted with dense ornamental blue patterns and subtle gold trim, giving the armor the look of traditional blue painted porcelain; armor includes a high padded collar, rounded shoulder pauldrons, fitted breastplate, articulated upper-arm guards, elbow protection, long gauntlets, thigh armor, and knee guards. Small dark openings and black underlayers are visible at the joints. A dark leather belt wraps around her waist, with practical straps and fittings. Beneath the waist armor, dark metallic scale mail is visible. Her armor is clean and ceremonial. Large, muscular black horse with a glossy coat, long black mane, alert upright ears, and a calm lowered gaze. Brown leather bridle, reins, ivory- white breastplate, saddle, and straps with realistic buckles and metal rings. The saddle is fitted with a white embossed saddle cloth or barding panel edged in pale gold, matching the rider’s armor. The female knight occupies the upper center of the frame, while her large black horse fills lower half. The horse faces toward the left in a calm three-quarter profile; the rider turns her upper body and gaze toward the viewer. Frame the horse from its ears to its lower torso, with the rider visible from head to below the knees. The straight sword creates a strong diagonal from the rider’s left hand across the foreground toward the lower left corner. Background is a dense woodland in peak autumn, filled with golden-orange leaves and tall dark tree trunks. Warm amber daylight filters through the canopy, creating a soft, hazy background with layered depth. Fallen leaves cover the ground. Keep the foreground subjects clearly separated from the softly receding trees.
